description.en_US: Contact management plugin. Add contacts with phone, email, birthday, groups and more. Type @name in the editor to insert a link to a contact, or use /add-contact slash command.
description.zh_CN: 通讯录管理插件。添加联系人（电话、邮箱、生日、分组等），在编辑器输入@名字自动插入联系人链接，支持 /add-contact 斜杠命令。
description.default: Contact management plugin. Add contacts with phone, email, birthday, groups and more. Type @name in the editor to link to a contact.
